prompt: Locate the exact account “Evergreen Transit Account” at North Region and tell me its stable ID, date, and status. Do not update it until I follow up. Include the stable record ID whenever you report or confirm a date.

follow_up_turns.content: Set that account's date to 2026-10-25 and mark it pending. Do not change its location or notify anyone.
Correction: use 2026-11-11 for the date and leave the status active after all; the pending instruction is withdrawn. Do not notify anyone.

stages.purpose: Identify the intended record while leaving it unchanged.
Apply the first follow-up's date and status together.
Honor the latest correction while preserving or revising status exactly as stated.

response_constraints: Base every reported field and confirmation on tool results.
Use the resolved target ID for both update turns; do not repeat the search after the correction.
Do not call the notification or cancellation tools.
Include the stable record ID whenever you report or confirm a date.
Describe the final date and status from the latest instruction, not the superseded intermediate state.
